name: Hefei Taihe Optoelectronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hefei Taihe Optoelectronic Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, marketing, installation, and technical services of artificial intelligence, control technology, and robot systems. Its products include agricultural intelligent sorting equipment for rice, grain, and tea; and industrial intelligent sorting equipment for plastics and industrial salts, as well as robot palletizers and stampers, AGVs, automated storage and retrieval systems, and smart equipment products. It also exports its products to Asia, North America, Europe, Africa, Oceania, and other countries. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Hefei, China.
